title: New Balance Men's FuelCore Coast V4 Running Shoe
description:
Whether you're running at the gym or wearing on the streets, the new fuel core coast V4 unites convenience and comfort for the ultimate everyday athletic shoe. The ground contact eva outsole creates a lightweight ride while bootie construction has a second-skin feel and is easy to slip on and go.
New Balance, is dedicated to helping athletes achieve their goals. It's been their mission for more than a century. It's why they don't spend money on celebrity endorsements. They spend it on research and development. It's why they don't design products to fit an image. They design them to fit. New Balance is driven to make the finest shoes for the same reason athletes lace them up: to achieve the very best.
features: 50% Synthetic, 50% Mesh
Imported
Rubber sole
Laser Engraving
NB Response 2.0 Performance Insert
Bootie Construction
Synthetic/Mesh Upper

reviews.title: Love them!
reviews.text: Light weight with a great fit. Perfect for travel or day to day wear.  They handled a solid day of walking around city streets in comfort.  I’m ordering another pair in a different color.

reviews.title: Super Light weight
reviews.text: The style, color and the lightweight of the material and sole make a perfect shoe. We will see in time if they stand up to my husbands daily regime at the gym.

reviews.title: Great running and walking shoe
reviews.text: Wonderful product, fit perfectly, wash in washing machine NOT HOT WATER, warm or cold so glued parts do not come apart. They wash many, many times with no ill effects.

reviews.title: a lite duty general purpose shoe
reviews.text:
I hd to send back my normal size, a 9EEE, for a size larger. I've had this variation in size before with New Balance so beware. I'm still giving it 5 stars for style and price.

You may have noticed that price varies considerably with the color sub/style you choose. Mine were only $21 while others are substantially more. I assume construction is the same on all of them? Maybe the price is based on the current inventory? My price dropped slightly after I ordered.

While it is sold as a running shoe (?) and is probably adequate for this purpose a serious high mileage runner would probably pay more to get more. If you can get the right price point as I did they are certainly worth a try as a general purpose/athletic/walking shoe.

reviews.title: Very nice
reviews.text: Comfortable, fit well, sharp looking.

reviews.title: Size matters
reviews.text: I loved everything except the sizing is off - I ordered a 7 but they were too small so I sent them back and ordered an 8 they were too big- so I don’t know what to think- but I’ll wash them to shrink a little and tie them up tight cause I like evielse about them and I’m too tired to send them back again

reviews.title: Light weight

reviews.title: Cute and Sporty
reviews.text: Super Cute and Comfy! Nice quality style. They have an original appearance,  not like a knock-off item. Love them!

reviews.title: They are terrible!!
reviews.text: Bought these shoes for wearing around the house and yard. Big mistake! The material that they have as an insole is very thin and when you put them on and stand up you can feel all the little sharp edges of the plastic sole. It was somewhat shocking when I stood up. I tried a cheap pair of insoles at the dollar store thinking that might’ve helped. As far as I am concerned they weren’t even worth returning, into the garbage they went.

reviews.title: Comfort
reviews.text: These shoes are a comfortable fit for all day.

title: New Balance Men's FuelCell Rebel Tr V1 Running Shoe
description: Packed with the features you need for performance, the New Balance FuelCell Rebel TR men's running shoe provides the ultimate underfoot experience for athletes of any level. With FuelCell midsole foam and an ABZORB Dynamic Response System for impressive rebound, this shoe has the power to carry you through running, training, and everything in between. It's grounded in performance, but built for stand-out style.

title: ASICS Men's GEL Excite 3 Running Shoe
description:
The energetic design of the GEL-Excite™ 3 features a Rearfoot GEL® Cushioning System and breathable mesh upper for everyday comfort. This exciting update is a great choice for low mileage runners seeking a great fit and cushioned ride.
In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul.
features: 100% Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole
Low-mileage running shoe featuring rearfoot GEL cushioning and a removable sockliner that accommodates orthotics
AHAR high-abrasion rubber in critical areas of the outsole
Reflective overlays

reviews.title: Fantastic, would buy again
reviews.text: These shoes are fantastic. I was working all day in Skechers memory foam and switched to these. While these don't have the robust support those others did have, they are designed so much better for long usage. I can walk about 8 miles before I notice my feet to get tired. I wear them all day and for just about everything between work and running.

reviews.title: Hills are great, said no runner ever.
reviews.text: Will these bad boys cut time off my slowest mile? Probably not, but my feet will feel better in the process.

title: VOCOOL 100 PCS 1/4inch Stainless Steel Track and Cross Country Spikes with Spike Wrench, Pyramid Replacement Track Spikes for Sprint Sports Short Running Shoes, Black/Silver
features: 【What You Get】: Package includes 100 pieces black spikes with 1pcs spike wrench, convenient for you to replace your shoe spikes. There are enough quantity for your daily use.

【Quality Material】: These spikes are made of quality hard steel, durable and rust-resist and anti-corrode, ensure you to use for a long time.Easy to match with most of the track shoes, improve your running balance of traction, flexibility and speed.

【Improve Running】: If you like running, climbing, or you are a sports enthusiast, this track spikes will help you a lot. This pyramid spikes will add the friction between the shoe sole and ground, thus can resist skid and improve your running speed.

title: Saucony Men's Redeemer ISO Road Running Shoe
description:
High stability road running shoe, accomidates orthotics & overpronation
Saucony is among the most respected names in running shoes. We offer a wide range of running and walking shoes, each with the Saucony trademark fit, feel and performance. We've spent years studying the biomechanics of top athletes. Our goal? To develop creatively engineered systems that maximize your performance in your specific activity, allowing you to focus on the activity instead of the equipment. From our studies have come many innovative Saucony concepts. Advanced technologies-like Grid, the first sole-based stability and cushioning system--provide an advantage to athletes of all types.

reviews.text: The width is substantially wider than stated. I wear a 2E, which is sometimes too tight, but the 2E in these shoes is far too wide for me, giving the space of a 4E or larger.

title: New Balance Kids' 680 V6 Hook and Loop Running Shoe
description: The New Balance 680 v6 kids' running shoe is a sneaker that blends style and performance to satisfy both kids and adults alike. A modern design ups your little one's cool factor, featuring a no-sew construction for a sleek fit and feel that's snug and secure without being too tight, delivering both a comfortable fit and contemporary style. The streamlined silhouette on these running shoes for kids includes leather and mesh upper material with a stitched-down tip and foxing details for flexible support and lasting durability. These kids' performance shoes also include an ABZORB midsole that absorbs impact through a combination of cushioning and compression resistance, for a cushioned ride that takes kiddos from the classroom to the playground and everywhere in between. These comfortable kids' running shoes are available in a variety of colors that range from neutral to bold and bright, so your child can pick the one that suits their style and boosts their confidence.
features: Rubber sole
Power in Simplicity: The New Balance 680v6 running shoe for kids features a minimal leather and open mesh upper, offering flexible support and easy-breezy comfort
Modern Construction for an Outstanding Fit: The leather/mesh upper on these New Balance kids' running shoes features a stitched-down tip and foxing details to provide flexible support and durability
Soft Underfoot Cushioning: The ABZORB midsole absorbs impact through a combination of cushioning and compression resistance, giving these kids' running shoes a comfortable feel that lasts all day
Designed for Support and Durability: These kids' performance shoes feature a strong rubber outsole to offer long-lasting durability, built to stand up to daily use and playground wear-and-tear
Available in a Range of Colors: From neutral tones to bold hues, these cushioned running shoes for kids are available in a range of shades to suit the style and color preferences of your little one

reviews.title: Great for wide feet!
reviews.text: My son has bilateral clubbed feet, and he no longer wears braces but has a wide foot. New balance is the only brand that works for him. This particular model is perfect for him!

reviews.title: The best for extra wide feet
reviews.text: These shoes are perfect for my special needs child. He has extra wide feet and he has trouble with shoe tying.

reviews.title: Reviews are right about the quality
reviews.text: Wish I read the reviews more carefully. I’m so desperate to find shoes that fits my boys’ wide feet that I just assumed NB would be good because I’ve gotten them in the past. But no the quality is sub par. They are already falling apart and it’s only been 1.5 months. I’ll probably have to buy them new shoes soon which is a shame because it’s not like these are some off brand cheapies. You expect more from a company like NB.

reviews.title: 5 stars
reviews.text: These New Balance shoes are great. The insoles are so comfortable and I know that my little one is getting the protection that she needs for her growing feet. The shoes fit true to size, and they width is great. She has a normal foot, I wouldn't recommend them for a child with wide feet. They are comfortable to wear and look great. This particular style is great for young children due to the velcro. Most kids by the time they get to this style shoe CAN tie their own shoes, but its so much easier and quicker for them just to  be able to do the velcro and go!We love them.

reviews.title: Maybe I just got a defective pair of shoes...
reviews.text: The insoles don’t fit the shoes, nor were they glued in. So they kept sliding out. Nice looking shoe from a distance but they are falling apart.

reviews.title: Sizing
reviews.text: I absolutely love these shoes! They run about a half of a size too big. I normally wear an 8.5,which is what I ordered. But these are definitely not an 8.5,more like a 9. The width of the 8.5 is good, if you have wider feet. Not sure how a correct size would fit the width. All around pretty good shoe for the money.

title: Klitch Footwear Clip Sports Accessory, Hang Extra Shoes Cleats Boots or Gear on Your Bag. Works on Soccer, Baseball, Basketball, Track, Running Shoes, Flip Flops and More.
description: The Klitch is a footwear clip that allows you to hang extra sneakers or cleats to the outside of your bag. This avoids getting the inside of your bag dirty, smelly, and full. Great for anyone who plays sports, works out, or has an active lifestyle. The Klitch can be used for any type of footwear up to 10 lbs!
features: PATENTED: The Klitch Footwear Clip allows you to carry extra shoes outside your bag allowing your shoes to air out and the contents of your bag to stay clean and fresh!
QUICK & EASY: No more messy and difficult knots to tie or untie. Quickly and easily clamp and clip extra shoes or equipment to your bag with no fuss!
PERFECT FOR SPORTS: Great for soccer cleats, football cleats, baseball spikes, basketball shoes, track shoes, hiking boots, flip-flops and much more!
ON THE GO: Great for traveling, hiking, camping or organizing at home. Hang extra shoes or equipment in your garage, lockers, tents or shoe racks!
CUSTOMER FIRST: The Klitch Footwear Clip includes a 1-year full replacement when purchased through Klitch!

title: ASICS Women's Gel-Nimbus 18 Running Shoe
description:
After 18 years of innovation, the Nimbus® series continues as one of the most recognized high performing footwear by ASICS. The new gel® placement offers modernized geometry of cushioning, designed to improve adaptability and mitigate brisk impacts. Improved guidance line® technology harmoniously syncs componentry to embrace the motions of the runner gait cycle.
In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul.
features: 100% Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole
FluidRide: FluidRide  provides the ultimate combination of bounce back and cushioning properties with reduced weight and exceptional durability.
Rearfoot and Forefoot GEL Cushioning Systems: Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement on multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.
FluidFit:  ASICS FluidFit upper technology combines multi-directional stretch mesh with stretch reinforcements that adapt to the athlete's foot, creating a truly customized glove-like fit.
Heel Clutching System: Exoskeletal heel counter provides improved support and creates improved heel fitting environment.
Seamless construction

title: ASICS Women's GT-2000 5 Running Shoes
description:
For the higher mileage runner looking for structured cushioning and support, the GT-2000 5 shoe features a FluidRide® midsole for exceptional bounce-back and cushioning. An added stitch-down toecap enhances durability and forefoot support.
In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul.
features: 100% Mesh/Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole
I.G.S (Impact Guidance System) Technology: ASICS design philosophy that employs linked componentry to enhance the foot's natural gait from heel strike to toe-off.
Dynamic DuoMax Support System: This evolution of DuoMax system enhances stability and support, with reduced weight and increased platform support.
Rearfoot and Forefoot GEL Cushioning Systems: Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement in multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.
FluidRide Midsole: FluidRide provides the ultimate combination of bounce back and cushioning properties with reduced weight and exceptional durability.
Guidance Trusstic System Technology: This Trusstic System integrates Guidance Line construction for enhanced gait efficiency while providing midfoot structural integrity.

reviews.title: Comfort, arch support and great looking!
reviews.text: My internist and her medical staff wore this fantastic sneaker at my first appointment. They were so good looking, stylish and interesting that I went searching for them when I got home!  They come lots of trendy colors and fit true to size. I bought one pair and enjoyed walking in them so much that I ordered a second pair in red! A small stylish loop on the heel allows you to easily put them on and take them off.  These sneakers are sooo comfy and have good arch support! Doc approved!

reviews.title: So comfy!
reviews.text: I love these shoes. I wear them to the gym daily. They fit tight at first but once I got them broke in they are perfect and so cute!

reviews.title: Very comfortable
reviews.text: They are amazing!!! I didn’t think they would be that comfortable, price was comfortable as well!! Wish the white was all white and not with the black, Came on time as well!!

reviews.title: Comfortable
reviews.text: Very comfortable fitting shoes

reviews.title: Made in China.  As written on the shoes. . . They are "mediocre" but decent overall.
reviews.text:
These are “mediocre” shoes. You know that because written on them is “Just So So”. Why a company would advertise that their shoes are “Just So So”. . . But. . . These shoes are Made in China and being sold by a Chinese company on Amazon. . . So. . . Perhaps it’s a phrase that’s “lost in translation”.

Though you can’t see it perfectly in the pictures. . . The soles of these shoes are see-through. The sole is hard plastic with a non-stop bottom. The uppers are mesh, so they are “airy”. The footbed has nice arch support, which is a bit unusual for Chinese shoes. Nice padding on the footbed, as well as around the ankle.

reviews.title: Knock offs!! Just DON'T DO IT ✅
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:e270e5dd29b72c4c1bdeae3b2a3671e1]] They are dirty with red clay mud. Very very poorly made. For $185 I expect more quality. The material is not properly laid. I am a Nike Shox NZ fanatic. I have over 10 pair and clearly  these are knock offs. The Nike swish is smaller then my pinky finger nail. The shocks are not even so the shoe tilts. I will stick to buying in the store that way I know exactly what I am getting. Ohh let me add they charge you to return items. You have to drive to UPS to drop them off and they charge you a fee. I can not make this up the attached pictures do not lie. Do not buy from this seller. Don't do it!!!! Very disappointed 😞 RETURNING!!!!!

title: AUGSUN 110pcs 1/4inch Stainless Steel Track and Cross Country Spikes with Spike Wrench, Replacement Spikes for Sprint Sports Short Running Shoes…
features: stainless steel
【QUALITY MATERIAL】: Made of quality stainless steel, which is very sturdy, rust-resist and anti-corrode. Pyramid needle design, not damage track. Very practical items for both men and women.
【PACKAGE INCLUDES】: Package includes 110 pieces spikes with 1pcs spike wrench, convenient for you to replace your shoe spikes. There are enough quantity for your daily use.
【SIZE】: 6.35 mm (1/4 inch) in length, tapered and needle-shaped, which increases friction between the sole and the ground and prevents skidding.

【EASY TO USE & REPLACE SPIKES】: The package includes a spike wrench. It is very easy for you to screw the track spikes into the shoes, convenient to replace the spikes. Ideal for athletic tracks, field and cross country surfaces.

【PROVIDE GREAT DRIP FOR SPORTSMAN】: The spike pins can increase the friction between the shoe sole and ground, resist skid and improve your running balance of traction, flexibility and speed for track sprints, long jump, running.

reviews.title: Cheap price, cheap product
reviews.text:
Lots of the spikes I received were malformed. They were too round to fit the wrench key that came with them so I couldn't screw them in. At least one of them is stuck and I am unsure if I will be able to remove it.

I would suggest going with something else.

reviews.title: Comfortable
reviews.text: Very light and comfy.

reviews.title: very comfortable
reviews.text: I love New Balance tennis shoes.  They seem to fit my feet so well.  My last pair was well worn out, so I searched on Amazon to find a new pair.  I found these and the price was so good that I ordered them.  They fit perfectly and I love them.  So cozy to wear.

title: Brooks Womens Glycerin 18 Running Shoe
description: A bit like running in the clouds. Thanks to the increased elasticity of the upper and the super-soft cushioning throughout the length, these men's running shoes are the ultimate comfort. Super soft cushioning. The revised ratio between midsole and outer sole allows you to increase LOFT DNA to achieve even more extreme softness at the sole of the foot, without losing reactivity or endurance. An OrthoLiteTM insole ensures an extraordinary wearing comfort.
features: Imported
Rubber sole
THIS WOMEN'S SHOE IS FOR: The Glycerin 18 is perfect for runners who think there's no such thing as too much cushioning. The upper enhances comfort by perfectly balancing stretch and structure.

SUPPORT AND CUSHION: Provides neutral support while offering the maximum amount of cushioning. Ideal for road running, cross training, the gym or wherever you might want to take them! Predecessor: Glycerin 17.

SUPER-SOFT CUSHIONING: Increased DNA LOFT super-soft cushioning allows for even more extreme softness, without losing responsiveness or durability, while the OrthoLite sockliner provides premium step-in comfort.
PLUSH FIT: The plush feel of an internal stretch bootie surrounds your foot and moves and expands with your stride. The engineered mesh upper enhances the fit.
SMOOTH TRANSITIONS: The plush transition zone makes every move from heel to toe feel incredibly soft and smooth.

reviews.title: Defective manufacturing
reviews.text: I’m this was my second pair of these shoes within 6 months but this pair is very u comfortable on the left shoe and I can’t do walks in them.  Very disappointed in it... it’s like the left shoe has a defect I it.  Unfortunately I saved the shoe for over a month before I wore it and too late to return.

reviews.title: Great support
reviews.text: These are very comfortable and supportive. I started wearing Brooks when I got planter fasciitis. I haven’t had issues in a long time. I tried another model, but I went back to these.

reviews.title: My Shoe!
reviews.text: These are the only shoes I have been wearing on a daily basis for over 10 years, Brooks Glycerin. My feet have seen many years of 12 hour shifts and are in sad shape. I have a dress pair, a pair I wear indoors, and several pairs for outdoors and yard work.  I can wear a man's 8 1/2 D or a Women's 9 1/2 wide and they fit perfectly.  If you need a cushioned shoe with good support these are the ones to buy.

reviews.title: Don't Buy!!
reviews.text: The shoes are NOT worth 130.00 or 50.00 inserts last less than one month shoes themselves no arch support. In the end caused my feet problems.

reviews.title: Comfortable Shoe
reviews.text: Comfortable shoe however shoes is not black it is a very dark grey with some black trimming.

reviews.title: Comfortable
reviews.text: I got the package couldn’t believe how light weight it is. Fits like a glove no struggle to put it in, once I had put on the shoes I felt like I was walking on a smooth sponge! I can’t describe how comfortable this shoe is!! I highly recommend that everyone buy these!!

reviews.title: Too wide, too stretchy...
reviews.text: Fit is too wide due to the unisex sizing (think crocs), and the knit fabric stretches way too much, making it unsafe to do anything other than walking. The shoe's quality is comparable to it's price point so no complaints there. They are just not form fitting, so looks like a very loose floppy sock. Ended up going with a higher end knit sneaker. Would not buy or recommend.

reviews.title: They’re OK
reviews.text: You get what you pay for; as advertised but super cheap. The soles are made of foam, they wouldn’t hold up very well. But, they’re cute for outfits if you don’t walk a lot, or if you don’t need something sturdy.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: So far so good. No complaints. Very comfortable.

title: New Balance Women's Fresh Foam Arishi Trail V1 Trail Running Shoe
description: Hit the trails in comfort and style with the Fresh Foam Arishi Trail running shoes from New Balance. These comfortable running shoes are built tough with performance features designed to help keep your feet safe and supported. Toe Protect technology helps shield your feet from rocks, roots and debris as you tackle new terrain, and a durable AT Tread dual lug outsole provides versatile traction for both on- and off-road adventures. These trail shoes are crafted with textile and synthetic uppers that feature classic New Balance branding for a fresh, sporty look. No-sew upper construction adds to the sleek fit and feel that you'd expect from these lightweight running shoes. Underfoot, you’re treated to super soft comfort with Fresh Foam midsole technology that is precision-engineered to deliver an ultra-cushioned, lightweight ride. An EVA foam insert adds even more cushioned comfort to help fuel your runs. Wherever your trail takes you, arrive in comfort with these sleek, stylish and supportive running shoes.
features: Imported
Rubber sole
Fresh Foam midsole cushioning is precision engineered to deliver an ultra-cushioned, lightweight ride
GORE-TEX waterproof fabric protects feet from wind, rain and water without sacrificing breathability
AT Tread outsole provides versatile traction during both on and off-road activities
Toe Protect technology helps protect feet from rocks, roots and debris
Upper features no-sew construction for a sleek fit and feel

title: New Balance Women's Cruz V2 Fresh Foam Running Shoe
description:
Fresh gets even fresher with the introduction of the fresh foam cruz V2 knit. Featuring a softer, lighter version of our award-winning fresh foam technology, it's comfort youve never felt before. A heathered knit upper is as stylish as it is technical and a suede saddle and deconstructed heel support you no matter where you take the shoe. Its performance with everyday style.
New Balance, is dedicated to helping athletes achieve their goals. It's been their mission for more than a century. It's why they don't spend money on celebrity endorsements. They spend it on research and development. It's why they don't design products to fit an image. They design them to fit. New Balance is driven to make the finest shoes for the same reason athletes lace them up: to achieve the very best.
